description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with a rounded head, no visible facial features, and long hair that falls to one side. The figure is dressed in a long-sleeved top and knee-length pants, with the sleeves and pant legs ending in a slightly frayed or unfinished style. The arms are extended outward, and the hands are open with visible fingers. The figure wears flat, open-toed sandals, and the feet are proportionally large compared to the rest of the body. The overall build is slender, with a slightly exaggerated cartoon-like appearance and smooth, simplified surfaces.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian with long hair, a long-sleeved top, knee-length pants, and open-toed sandals, featuring a simplified, cartoon-like build.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the outstretched arms, rounded head, and the full length of the hair falling to one side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the long hair, and the side silhouette of the clothing and sandals.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view displaying the soles of the sandals, the back of the legs, and the rear of the head and hair.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, the arm and hand shape, and the side of the head and hair.
attribute_clothing_type: casual long-sleeved top and knee-length pants
